3193300.name: Tales of Valkyrie
3193300.description:
Tales of Valkyrie follows the perilous descent of two young women—Princess Lenneth and the witch Jelanda—into the demon realm. At its core, it’s a story about loyalty, trust, and the kind of friendship that refuses to break even when everything else does.

Lenneth, princess of Artolia, is dragged into a brutal struggle for the throne, forced to clash with her own siblings. Her quest to claim the Demon King’s heart is lined with danger after danger, every step threatening to snap the thin thread her life hangs on.

In her darkest moments, Jelanda appears—unyielding, ever-present, and unwilling to let Lenneth face the abyss alone. But can genuine friendship endure when the road is nothing but thorns? What horrors lurk in the demon lands? And can mere humans stand against the creatures that rule that world?

More than a typical story-driven adventure, this is where action collides with reflection. Carve through the monstrous fiends that plague the realm, meet allies along the way, and forge your own distinct combat style. Collect relics, rare artifacts, and eccentric gear in this classic turn-based RPG experience.

Key Features

- Old-school turn-based dungeon crawling

- A versatile skill system that lets you shape each character’s fighting style

- Hunt for shiny loot, strap on dubious equipment, and face a chilling lineup of shadow-born enemies

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
